title: Totem Optimizer
description: anti ghost (prevents ghosting by sending extra updates), Client side visually instant toteming, Fixes totem flicker.
body:
**Totem Optimizer**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord\&logoColor=white\&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth\&logoColor=white\&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Adds anti ghost by adding more inventory updates and for things to react quicker visually as well as reduced flicker client side. When moving a totem into your mainhand or offhand, Minecraft can sometimes visually desync, flicker, or show the wrong slot state for a moment when inventory updates are being corrected. Totem Optimizer helps reduce that by forcing extra inventory reupdates on the client, which helps prevent ghosting and keeps the shown inventory state corrected faster. Works across 1.21 - 1.21.11 in the same jar (1.21.X) Also supports 26.1 - 26.1.2 with the 26.1.X version. **Requires:** - [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons/versions) ---
**What it does**
--- Totem Optimizer sends extra inventory updates so your client refreshes the shown slot state faster. (Exact way anti ghost does it, though not the same code it works pretty much the same so it should be allowed on mctiers.) This helps when retoteming into your mainhand or offhand and the item visually flickers, ghosts, or looks delayed for a moment. The server still controls the real inventory. This mod does not give any real advantage other than reducing ghosting, and does not change how totems actually work. It only helps the client keep the inventory display updated faster. **There is also server opt out support**, so servers can disable Totem Optimizer if they do not want players using it on their server. This mod is client side, but if a server opts out then the optimizer will turn itself off there. just incase people want this but there should be no need to have it really. if you want the opt out just make a ticket in the discord! ---
